title: epidendrum capitalinum
intro: Epidendrum capitalinum, also known as the 'Coral Cactus', is a type of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum capitalinum include its ability to soothe bronchial tubes, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms of asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
